commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a 16 MiB default, env-configurable runtime session-store cache cap and tests that oversized stores are not retained in serialized/object/snapshot caches.

PR surface: Source +54, Tests +71. Total +125 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the cache-retention path: current main writes parsed stores and snapshots into runtime caches without a size-aware cap, and the PR supplies a terminal fixture showing the changed behavior. I did not reproduce the full gateway V8 OOM in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review should accept or tune the new 16 MiB runtime cache cap; there is no narrow automated code repair indicated by this review.
